revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  | [[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
  }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  | [[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
  }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  | [[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
  }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  | [[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
  }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  |   }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  |   }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FEIS here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FEIS for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | <!-- {{color|red|Please provide the species epithet in the parameter {{para|species}}. }}
   -->{{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}<!--
-->{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}<!--
   
-->{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  |   }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=FEIS for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#invoke: template wrapper | wrap | _template = citation | _exclude = code, genus, species, subspecies, type, variety
   | mode = {{#invoke:Citation mode|main|cs1}}
   | title = {{{genus|}}} {{{species|}}} {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}} | subsp. }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}} | var. }}{{{subspecies|}}}{{{variety|}}}{{#if: {{{species|}}}||spp.}}
   | url = https://www.fs.usda.gov/database/feis/{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}{{{type|}}}/{{#if:{{{code|}}}|{{{code|}}}|{{str left|{{lc:{{{genus|}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{species|spp}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}|animals/|2|3}}}}{{str left|{{lc:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}|1}}}}}}/all.html
   | website = Fire Effects Information System (FEIS)
   | publisher = US Department of Agriculture (USDA), Forest Service (USFS), Rocky Mountain Research Station, Fire Sciences Laboratory
}}{{#if: {{{genus|{{if both | {{{title|}}} | {{{code|}}} | 1 }}}}}
   |
   | {{color|red|Please provide the genus in the parameter {{para|genus}}. }}
   }}{{#if: {{{species|}}}
   |
   | {{#if:{{{variety|{{{subspecies|}}}}}}
      |{{color|red|{{para|subspecies}} or {{para|variety}} has been supplied but not {{para|species}}.}}
      }}
   }}{{#if: {{{variety|}}}
   |  {{#if: {{{subspecies|}}}
      | {{color|red|You have selected both {{para|subspecies|{{{subspecies|}}}}} and {{para|variety|{{{variety|}}}}}. This is most likely an error.}}
      }}
   }}{{#ifeq:{{FEIS/type|{{{type|}}}}}
   | error
   | {{color|red|Either you did not provide a value for {{para|type}}, or the value you provided is not recognized. For a list of options, see [[Template:FEIS/doc]].}}
   }}{{#if: {{{first|}}}{{{first1|}}}{{{author|}}}{{{author1|}}}{{{authors|}}}
  |
  |   }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Pages using FEIS template without author names]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
